name: ARILFaultInjectionDisturbChecksum
title: ARILFaultInjectionDisturbChecksum
syntax: long ARILFaultInjectionDisturbChecksum (dbMessage, long type, long disturbanceMode, long disturbanceCount, long disturbanceValue);
description: Disturbs the CRC of a PDU or signal group (see CRC Value). The function without the parameter for the signal group will only disturb CRCs that are not part of a signal group.

parameters.name: dbMessage
parameters.description: The symbolic name of a PDU in the database.
